ignorePatterns:
**/node_modules/**
apps/jump-web/dist/**
services/jumpd/cmd/jumpd/web/assets/**
services/jumpd/cmd/jumpd/web/index.html
services/jumpd/cmd/jumpd/web/manifest.json
services/jumpd/cmd/jumpd/web/favicon.svg
bin/**
coverage/**
test-results/**
playwright-report/**
**/*.tsbuildinfo
instructions: Review Jump as a browser-first session manager with a Harness v0 operating model. Prioritize correctness, regressions, release safety, and validation gaps over style nits. For user-visible behavior, check that story docs and docs/TEST_MATRIX.md stay current. For build/release changes, verify web __JUMP_VERSION__, Go main.version, and GoReleaser version stamping remain consistent.

rules.rule: When a change alters user-visible behavior, validation expectations, architecture constraints, or release flow, flag missing updates to the relevant docs, story packet, or docs/TEST_MATRIX.md.
Flag broad refactors, unrelated formatting churn, or one-off patches when a smaller design-aligned fix would solve the issue.
For build or release changes, verify frontend and backend versions are stamped from the same intended source and that local overrides remain possible.
